---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea
title: ''
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem / motivation

What problem are you trying to solve? What's the use case?

## Proposed solution

A clear and concise description of what you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches or workarounds you've thought about.

## Scope

Which part(s) of the project does this touch?

- [ ] App (iOS / Android / Web)
- [ ] Backend
- [ ] Self-host / deployment
- [ ] Docs

## Additional context

Anything else, mockups, links, etc.

---

> **Note:** Chara follows a focused MVP scope. We genuinely appreciate every
> idea, but not all requests will be accepted — we keep the surface area small
> on purpose. Feel free to open a Discussion first if you'd like to gauge
> interest before investing time.
